sections.heading: What is this?
paragraphs: SAFS is a security-focused platform for anonymous student feedback in schools.
The goal is to make honest feedback safe to share while keeping access strictly controlled.
SAFS is currently in beta, which means that, while security is high, there are limited features.

sections.heading: Purpose
paragraphs: SAFS exists to provide a practical and trustworthy channel for anonymous class feedback.
Students should be able to report issues or suggestions without needing personal accounts.

sections.heading: How SAFS works
bullets: ● A school account can create class-level representative accounts.
● Each class has a feedback link and a class password for anonymous posting.
● Only authorized class representatives can access class messages.

contact.heading: Create a school account
paragraphs: If you want to create an account for your organization, contact SAFS through email or GitHub.
